raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ka ir Afimis ir Spals
cegahje/ un tee Tawkt to Afimini
apklahje/ jo wiꞥſch ne iſwille to
Sohbinu no winna Wehdera/ un
tee Suhdi iſtezzeja no winna.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad iṣgahje Eüds no ta
Kambara/ un aiſsflehde ta Kam-
bara Durwis pakkat ſewin/ un
aiſspeede tahß.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad tas nu bij iṣgahjis/
tad nahze winna Kalpi/ un re-
dseja/ un luk ta Kambara Dur-
wis bija aiſsflehgtas/ un tee faz-
zija : Jaschu wiꞥſch tawas Rah-
jas apklahj Dseſtra Kambari.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad tee nu gaidija tikilgi/
ka tee paſchi fannejahs/ rangi/ tad
ne atdarrija wiꞥſch ta Kambara
Durwis/ tad nehme wiꞥſti to
Atſlehgu/ un atflehde/ un reds/
winnu Kungß gulleja pee Seim-
mes nomiris.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Eüds iſsprukke/ ka-
mebr tee gaidija/ jo wiꞥſch gahje
fezzen pee tahm iṣgreestalm Bil-
dehtm/ un iſsprukke uhs Seiratm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad wiꞥſch tur nahze/
tad trummeteja wiꞥſch ar Trum-
metehm us Gewräima Kalneem/
un Israëta Behrni nogahje ar
winnu no teem Kalneem/ un
wiꞥſch pats winnu Breeſcha.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch fazzia uṣteem :
Dſeneetees pakkat/ jo tas KUNGß
irr juhſus Eenaidneekus tohs
Moabitenisjuhſu Rohká deviſ/
un tee nogahje winnam pakkat/
un uṣgebine tahß Jardanas pahr-
tijann Weetu/ kas prett Moa-
bu/ un ne laide ne weennu pahreet.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee kawve no teem M
abiteereem tanzi Laiká pee deſmi-
tuhſtofscheem Wihreem/ wiﬀu
refnus un wiﬀus ſtiprus Wil-
rus/ ka ne weens iſsprukke.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad tappe Moabs ta
Deená appakſch Israëta Beh-
nu Rohkas paſemmohts/ un t
Semme duſſeja aſtondefinit
Gaddus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un pehz winnu bija Sam-
garß Anata Dehls/ tas kaw-
no teem Wihliſtereem feſchſint
Wihrus ar Wehrſcha Dſenna-
mo/ ta iſpestija wiꞥſch arridsa
Israëlu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta IV. Modalla.
Israëls tobß Atkahpfchanas labbad pahrdoh-
eekich Jabina to Kananiteru Rehnina Roſ-
kas: 1/2. No kurra Warras ta Prawee-
Debora/un Baraks tobß Laudis atkatispesti
4. Sifferus/ Jabina Karra-Spehka Wir-
neeks/ tobß no Jaëleß/ weenas Seewas wo-
kants: 17/21.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Et Israëta Behrni dar
Rijaatkak/tas tamKUNG-
SAM ne patikle/ ka-
Eüds bija nomiris.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad pahrdewe tobß ta-
KUNGß Jabina to Kananiteru
Rehnina Rohká/ kas Azorá wal-
dija/ un winna Karra-Spehka
Wirſneeks bija Sifferus/ un tas
dsihwoja Arosetá to Pagana-
(Pilsjahta).
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad brehze Israëta Behr-
nt us to KUNGU/ jo tam bija
dewinfints Dſelsu Ratti/ un bij
Israëta Behrnuß ar Warru ſpai-
dijs diwidefinits Gaddus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Debora weena Pra-
weeta
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
